posts.text: 🔥 AMAZING OFFER! 🔥 Get your brand new iPhone 15 Pro Max for only £49.99 TODAY ONLY! Don't miss out on this incredible discount. Click the link to buy now before it's gone forever! #iPhone #Sale #MustBuy
posts.explanation: This post is spam because it uses aggressive promotional language and claims an unrealistic discount on a specific product.
